de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class PurePosDPathFeature

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.AbstractBetaFeature
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.PurePosDPathFeature
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class PurePosDPathFeature
extends AbstractBetaFeature
    Binary feature that returns zero iff the find-formula of a rule contains a d-path consisting only of positive literals (as a formula of the antecedent). Used terminology is defined in Diss. by Martin Giese.

    • Nested Class Summary
